content.text:
Status update — I started the requested work and escalated to the Navigator agent for execution.

What I did so far
- Checked the requested paths in order:
  - @Cornerstone/Nestle — found (id: Nestle)
  - @Cornerstone/Tesla — found (id: Tesla)
  - @graph/Pricing — not found
  - @graph/Companies — not found
  - @Cornerstone/Companies — not found
- Attempted to create @Cornerstone/Companies and @Cornerstone/Pricing and the two pricing nodes, but the platform rejected the UpdateContent requests with a JSON mapping error ("Types JsonElement could not be mapped to data source").

Next step taken
- I delegated this task to the Navigator agent (includes full instructions and desired field values, metadata, linking to company refs, and final NavigateTo display). Navigator has been requested to:
  - Create @Cornerstone/Companies and @Cornerstone/Pricing if missing
  - Create lightweight company reference nodes at @Cornerstone/Companies/Nestle and @Cornerstone/Companies/Tesla (if needed)
  - Create pricing nodes under @Cornerstone/Pricing/Pricing-Nestle and @Cornerstone/Pricing/Pricing-Tesla with the fields you requested (effectiveDate set to today 2026-02-19, status Draft, currency USD, price left empty/null, createdBy Navigator, and metadata createdAt/createdBy/source)
  - Call NavigateTo for each created pricing node so you can view them under @Cornerstone/*

Why I escalated
- The mesh UpdateContent calls failed due to a platform type-mapping error. Rather than continue with repeated failing attempts, I escalated to Navigator to complete the operations directly in the mesh and to display the created nodes.

What I need from you (if anything)
- If the platform requires an exact price or additional required properties, I will report which fields are missing and ask you for values. At the moment you requested price=null (left empty), which I included in the instructions.

What you can expect next
- Navigator will attempt the creation and then respond back with:
  - Final full paths/IDs of created nodes (e.g., @Cornerstone/Pricing/Pricing-Nestle and @Cornerstone/Pricing/Pricing-Tesla)
  - Confirmation that NavigateTo was executed for each node (so you can view them at your Cornerstone URL pattern)
  - If any fields were rejected or required by the platform, a short list of which values are still needed.

If you'd like me to retry creating the nodes here instead of escalating, tell me and I will attempt another update (but I expect the same type-mapping error unless the content format is adjusted).
